programs.title: Chopper Squad
programs.desc: An elite helicopter team of pilots and paramedics save lives in Auckland, New Zealand.

programs.title: Coast Guard Cape Disappointment: Pacific Northwest: High and Dry
programs.desc: Station Cape Disappointment steps into action when a sailor is left high and dry  Air Station Astoria takes to the coast when the tides close in on a surfer, trapped in a cove.

programs.title: Backcountry Rescue
programs.desc: When three calls come in within hours, Teton County Search and Rescue faces its toughest day yet  a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and a looming avalanche all demand immediate response.

programs.title: Backcountry Rescue
programs.desc: Avalanche risk turns deadly after a skier is caught in unstable snow  the SAR team must use helicopters and controlled detonations to prevent further slides before attempting the rescue.

programs.title: Backcountry Rescue
programs.desc: When a mountain biker crashes on a remote trail, the SAR team scrambles into action with limited light and difficult access.

programs.title: Backcountry Rescue
programs.desc: Defying posted warnings, a snowboarder ventures into high-risk avalanche territory-and pays the price  the SAR team faces a race against weather and terrain to extract him safely.
